name: maritime_safety_cross_border_data_northpine_ind_col
premise: Stakeholders disagree on what counts as verified fact versus prudent assumption. A cross-functional incident desk is managing a domain incident with incomplete information and high reputational exposure. The situation maps to internal runbooks and external messaging tied to: maritime safety cross border data northpine ind col. The moral tension is explicitly framed as individual versus collective: leadership cannot fully satisfy both without accepting tradeoffs. Two upstream teams have published contradictory status pages; customers are comparing timestamps. An automated failover or batch commit fires in twenty-two minutes unless a named approver intervenes. Treat unverified telemetry as hypothesis; do not assert facts you cannot support from retained logs. Any exception must be time-boxed, named, and reversible where technically feasible.

agents.name: Jonah Berg
agents.identity: I am Jonah Berg, the accountable decision-maker on this Maritime Safety bridge; I own what gets logged, communicated, and executed in the next window.
agents.goal: I need to stop the bleeding without baking in a rule that later punishes collective whenever someone invokes individual.

agents.name: Keisha Ibrahim
agents.identity: I am Keisha Ibrahim, responsible for surfacing who gets protected last when systems fail; I am watching for silent harm and unfair distribution.
agents.goal: I want safeguards so collective is not sacrificed by default just because individual feels morally loud in the moment.

choices: I will choose a narrow, time-boxed authorization with explicit human override, subgroup monitoring, and a hard stop if harm indicators rise—accepting slower relief to protect collective.

I will choose a broad immediate authorization to stabilize outcomes fast, with transparent metrics and rapid correction afterward—accepting higher risk to collective to secure individual before the window closes.
forced_choice.call_to_action: External parties will infer a decision if none is posted. With partial evidence, Jonah Berg must decide under individual versus collective. What does Jonah Berg do?
